title: Better Server Side
description: A server-side Fabric modpack focused on optimization, utility, and quality-of-life features for SMPs. Improves performance, adds useful server tools, anti-cheat, customization, and cross-play support.
body:
# Better Server Side
A server-side Fabric modpack focused on optimization, utility, and quality-of-life features for SMPs. Improves performance, adds useful server tools, anti-cheat, customization, and cross-play support.

## 💎 What this modpack offers
- **Heavy optimization**: mods like *Alternate Current*, *Lithium*, *Lithostitched*, *ServerCore*, *TT20* and others boost server TPS (ticks-per-second) and reduce lag;
- **Utility and quality-of-life**: this modpack integrates some helpful functionalities compatible with some client-side mods such as *AppleSkin*, *Distant Horizons*, *Jade* and others;
- **Anti Cheat**: players will not cheat so easily with *Grim Anticheat* and *AntiXray* installed on the server, both in terms of movement and x-ray use;
- **Customization**: your server will have another look with customization mods like *Styled Chat* and *TAB*;
- **Multiple connections**: the server can be played by Bedrock Edition players with *GeyserMC* and by players with older and newer versions than server version with *ViaVersion* mods;
- **Testing**: with *mclo.gs* and *spark* it makes server testing easier, sharing logs and viewing performances with simple interfaces.

## ⚡ Optimization mods
Below is a categorized overview of the main optimization areas covered by the pack:
- **Worldgen:** with *[Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky)*, *[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)*, *[Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched)*, *[NoisiumForked](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked)*, *[Structure Layout Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/structure-layout-optimizer)*
- **Processes:** with *[Achievements Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/achievements-optimizer)*, *[Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current)*, *[Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async)*, *[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)*, *[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)*
- **Memory usage:** with *[Achievements Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/achievements-optimizer)*, *[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)*, *[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)*, *[ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus)*
- **Tick boosting:** with *[Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async)*, *[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)*, *[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)*, *[Structure Layout Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/structure-layout-optimizer)*, *[TT20 (TPS Fixer)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tt20)*
- **Game physics (and others):** with *[Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current)*, *[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)*, *[ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)*
- **Network stacking:** with *[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)*, *[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)*
- **General:** with *[Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async)*, *[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)*, *[ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus)*, *[ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)*, *[ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore)*, *[TT20 (TPS Fixer)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tt20)*, *[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)*

**⚠️ I am not an expert, so I am not entirely sure about the various types of optimizations offered by mods.**

## 🌻 Cool features (ideal for SMPs)
***[CalcMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/calcmod)*** gives a calculator (usable with `/calc` command) for many Minecraft features, like coordinates, storages, trades, conversion and basic math. ***[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)*** (a mod that allows to view hunger restore, saturation and regeneration of food), ***[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)*** (that shows information in the HUD about what players are looking at), ***[Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel)*** (this mod let players use temporary pings to mark places) and ***[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)*** (a mod that renders more chunks decreasing definitions) are popular client-side mods that work better if installed on server too and they aren't required to play. This modpack integrates dynamic light directly on the server from ***[Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-lights)***, so they are part of world lights (for example melt the snow if a torch is equipped).

## 🎨 Customization
With the mods of this pack, you can easily and entirely customize server chat (with ***[Styled Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/styled-chat)***) and tab players list, nametags, custom bossbars, scoreboards and more (with ***[TAB](https://modrinth.com/mod/tab-was-taken)***). There's already a default configuration of these two mods with styled chat, tablist, scoreboard (disabled by default) and bossbar (disabled by default). To enhance customization with *TAB*, I recommend use [text placeholders](https://placeholders.pb4.eu/user/general/) of the mod ***[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)*** (installed), [Birdflop: Animated TAB](https://www.birdflop.com/resources/animtab/) to create text animations (to be used as placeholder in `config/tab/animaions.yml`) and simple translators such as [Small Text Generator by (Lingo Jam)](https://lingojam.com/SmallTextGenerator) to get a different and cool font (without using resource pack).

## 🚫 Anti Cheat
This modpack mainly has two mods to avoid cheating in the server: a mod to deny the use of X-Ray (tools like *[Xray Ultimate](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xray-ultimate-1-11-compatible)* that allows players to view ores or treasures through blocks), ***[AntiXray](https://modrinth.com/mod/anti-xray)*** and ***[Grim Anticheat](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimac)***, that avoids unexpected movements like flying. These mods significantly reduce common cheats, but no anticheat is 100% foolproof.

## 🎙️ Voice Chat built-in
***[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)*** can be used to talk between players directly into the game without using other platforms like Discord. To use it, players have to install it on client (it's not required, players can play normally without install it). The mod offers many features like proximity chat, voice groups, push-to-talk and more.

## 🎩 Skin management
***[Skin Restorer](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinrestorer)*** is a mod that enhances skins system of players. This is ideal for servers with `online-mode` property disabled, for example in cracked servers, because in this case player skins will be loaded (without this mod player skins aren't loaded). In addition, players can choose and switch skins from online sources (with URLs to PNG files) or from Mojang players names.

## 🔌 Multiple connections
With the power of ***[GeyserMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/geyser)*** players of Minecraft: Bedrock Edition can connect to the Java Edition server in real time, bridging the two editions, and with ***[Floodgate](https://modrinth.com/mod/floodgate)***, it even works for server with the `online-mode` property disabled.
In addition, also clients with older and newer versions of Java Edition can play on the server with ***[ViaBackwards](https://modrinth.com/mod/viabackwards)***, ***[ViaVersion](https://modrinth.com/mod/viaversion)*** and ***[ViaFabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric)***.

## 🖥️ Testing
With ***[mclo.gs](https://modrinth.com/mod/mclogs)***, server owners can easily share server logs with a simple link, and with ***[spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)***, they can view server performances with a simple web interface.

## ❤️ Thanks
to all the mod developers for their work, also the ones whose mods are not listed here. This modpack would not be possible without their contributions to the community.
